name: Lamb & Mushroom Korma
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean lamb, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan.
2. Add onion and fry gently until lightly golden.
3. Add ginger, garlic, cumin, coriander, cardamom seeds, and turmeric; stir constantly for 2 minutes.
4. Add lamb and cook until brown, stirring frequently.
5. Stir in yogurt and bring to a boil.
6. Stir well, cover, and cook gently for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Add mushrooms, re-cover, and cook for an additional 15 minutes or until the lamb is tender and yogurt is absorbed.
8. Stir in lemon juice, salt, and pepper; cook uncovered for 5 minutes.
9. Garnish with lime pieces and cilantro sprigs, if desired, and serve hot with Nan bread and saffron rice.
